A '''mission to York Skot''' was carried out by the elite [[Clone commando/Legends|commando]] team, [[High Orbit Precision Entry Squad|H.O.P.E. Squad]], to extract [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Treetower]] when he was jeopardized while he was attempting to intercept goods being smuggled by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. After fighting past droids and taking casualites, H.O.P.E. squad discovered a batch of [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] slaves.

{{Mission-stub}}
